title: Verify vote tally sequence is post-synthesis only

log.context: Verify vote tally sequence is post-synthesis only

The ordering is correct. Here is the exact sequence:

**Section 5 — Ibrahim synthesis (lines 200–237)**
`congress_debate` is called with `args=[topic, hm_name, session_id, thread_id, hm_display, 1, None, graphiti_ctx]`. This produces `synthesis_text`, which is then assigned to `verdict`. Ibrahim receives only the topic, his own persona, the thread context (prior debate messages), and an optional Graphiti memory blob. No vote data exists at this point.
